title: Cavendish Silences the Crowd
description: Pages 12–16 focus on cavendish silences the crowd, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Cavendish, Colosseum Audience, Doflamingo, Colosseum Announcer, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Tontatta as d Block begins with Rebecca hated by the crowd, until Cavendish turns the audience's cruelty back on itself and the battle begins.

dialogue.speaker: Cavendish
dialogue.text: Cavendish- same!

dialogue.speaker: Cavendish
dialogue.text: What a great person!

dialogue.speaker: Cavendish
dialogue.text: We don't even care about Rebecca anymore!!

dialogue.speaker: Cavendish
dialogue.text: What an amazingly charismatic guy!!

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Audience
dialogue.text: We're Cheering for You!!

dialogue.speaker: Cavendish
dialogue.text: Cavendish!!

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Audience
dialogue.text: He took on that storm of boos and repainted it into a wave of cheers!!

dialogue.speaker: Cavendish
dialogue.text: 01...!! I get it. It's not like this is what you wanted. They're so damn fickle... it's mad- dening.

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Audience
dialogue.text: An audience is inher- entirely a selfish thing.

dialogue.speaker: Cavendish
dialogue.text: But your sermon before...

dialogue.speaker: Cavendish
dialogue.text: I'm so popular!! I couldn't be happier!

dialogue.speaker: Cavendish
dialogue.text: So now you're happy!!?

dialogue.speaker: Cavendish
dialogue.text: It's been three long years!!!

dialogue.speaker: Cavendish
dialogue.text: Um, you stuck up for me...

dialogue.speaker: Cavendish
dialogue.text: Thank you very much...

dialogue.speaker: Cavendish
dialogue.text: ...ahh don't worry about it. The truth is that I was just mad... but I do feel for you....

dialogue.speaker: Cavendish
dialogue.text: So forget about it, because we're enemies now.

dialogue.speaker: Cavendish
dialogue.text: Isn't that true, you one or two reporters who must be out there somewhere?

dialogue.speaker: Cavendish
dialogue.text: I'd love it if what just happened makes it into an article.

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: After the match, there'll be an interview. It'll be like "Good afternoon, superstar." "A superstar? Me? Fufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufu

dialogue.speaker: Cavendish
dialogue.text: Well!! Amidst all the ruckus, it looks like everyone has assembled!!

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Announcer
dialogue.text: With one par- ticipant having defaulted, D-block is down to 137 fighters!!

dialogue.speaker: Cavendish
dialogue.text: It's a bat- TLE Royale between powerful combat- ants!!

dialogue.speaker: Cavendish
dialogue.text: So finally, here's the opening bell!!!

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Announcer
dialogue.text: In any case...

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Announcer
dialogue.text: Cavendish- same!

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Announcer
dialogue.text: Orlum- bus! Go get em't!

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Announcer
dialogue.text: Hey head- Chopper! Show us what you have got, Suleiman!!

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Announcer
dialogue.text: Breathe...

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Announcer
dialogue.text: Drop dead, Rebecca!

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Announcer
dialogue.text: Watch me now, Soldier- San!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Yellow Kabu!! And the pink bee Brigade!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: They've arrived from Green Bit!!

dialogue.speaker: Tontatta
dialogue.text: Well met, Leo!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Yes, at long last, Captain!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: I've also brought some leg- endary heroes.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: This battle really began 10 years ago!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: We fight to reclaim the honor of the Riku Royalty, regretfully forced to abdicate...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: As well as our own freedom!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Uooh how!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: One fateful day, he came to our fair country,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: that man... he violently stole away everything we had.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I will never forget that day!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: We've spent a year preparing these battle plans!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: And we finally have a way to prevail over this Shichibu- Kai pirate crew!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Yeah!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Alright! Now I've just got to listen to the plans carefully.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: and think about the best time to run away!!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Zoro- Land...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: We need to turn "left" soon.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: You think I don't know left from right!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: "Left" is the side where you don't have any swords on your waist...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: Yes.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: The one attacking your ship is...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: A female officer in the Donquixote family, JORA, and her crew!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: She artisti- Cally steals away her oppo- Nents' ability to fight, and can be quite a handful!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: How do you know so much!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: We only know the names, faces, and powers of all those at or above officer rank.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: Because we can't help but remember them!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: Especially because ten years ago... the dressrosa army was ann childhood by just three individuals.

dialogue.speaker: Trebol
dialogue.text: the strongest of the officers, "Trebol", "Diamante" and "PICA »...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: We could never forget their faces.....!!!

summary: Cavendish Silences the Crowd focuses on Cavendish, Colosseum Audience, Doflamingo, Colosseum Announcer, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2 as d Block begins with Rebecca hated by the crowd, until Cavendish turns the audience's cruelty back on itself and the battle begins.
